title: oldenlandia erecta
intro: Oldenlandia erecta, also known as Phyllanthus urinaria, is a plant species native to Asia and Australia, characterized by its small, yellowish-green flowers and erect growth habit. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat fever, dysentery, and diarrhea, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oldenlandia erecta include reducing inflammation, improving liver function, and protecting against oxidative stress, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, Oldenlandia erecta is often made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
